criteria.description: Runs 1 epoch on 10 synthetic samples without raising

reference_solution:
from datasets import load_dataset
from peft import LoraConfig, PeftModel, prepare_model_for_kbit_training
from transformers import (AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer,
                          BitsAndBytesConfig)
from trl import SFTConfig, SFTTrainer

model_id = 'stabilityai/stablelm-2-1_6b'
bnb = BitsAndBytesConfig(load_in_4bit=True, bnb_4bit_quant_type='nf4',
                         bnb_4bit_compute_dtype='bfloat16')
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_id, trust_remote_code=True)
if tokenizer.pad_token is None:
    tokenizer.pad_token = tokenizer.eos_token
model = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(model_id, quantization_config=bnb,
                                             device_map='auto',
                                             trust_remote_code=True)
model = prepare_model_for_kbit_training(model)

ds = load_dataset('databricks/databricks-dolly-15k', split='train')
ds = ds.map(lambda r: {
    'text': (f"### Instruction:\n{r['instruction']}\n"
             f"### Context:\n{r['context']}\n"
             f"### Response:\n{r['response']}")
})

lora = LoraConfig(r=32, lora_alpha=64, lora_dropout=0.05,
                  target_modules='all-linear',
                  bias='none', task_type='CAUSAL_LM')
args = SFTConfig(output_dir='./out/stablelm-dolly',
                 per_device_train_batch_size=4, num_train_epochs=1,
                 learning_rate=1e-4, bf16=True,
                 optim='paged_adamw_32bit', weight_decay=0.01,
                 save_strategy='no')
trainer = SFTTrainer(model=model, args=args, train_dataset=ds,
                     peft_config=lora, tokenizer=tokenizer)
trainer.train()
trainer.model.save_pretrained('./out/stablelm-dolly')
_ = PeftModel.from_pretrained(model, './out/stablelm-dolly')
